# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.
# Category: cloud_database_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0

parameters:
  serverName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure SQL Server
  databaseName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure SQL Database
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources
  administratorLogin:
    type: string
    minLength: 1
    metadata:
      description: Administrator username for the SQL Server
  administratorLoginPassword:
    type: securestring
    minLength: 12
    metadata:
      description: Administrator password for the SQL Server
  # Using Basic tier to minimize startup costs
  skuName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Basic
    allowedValues:
      - Basic
      - S0
      - S1
      - GP_S_Gen5_1
    metadata:
      description: SKU name for the database (Basic is cheapest at ~$5/month)
  skuTier:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Basic
    allowedValues:
      - Basic
      - Standard
      - GeneralPurpose
    metadata:
      description: SKU tier for the database
  maxSizeBytes:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 2147483648
    metadata:
      description: Max size of the database in bytes (default 2GB for Basic)
  # Minimal-cost auditing - strongly recommended even for startups
  enableAuditing:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: Enable SQL auditing (recommended - storage cost is minimal)
  auditStorageAccountName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: ""
    metadata:
      description: Storage account name for audit logs (required if enableAuditing is true)
  auditRetentionDays:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 30
    metadata:
      description: Number of days to retain audit logs (keep low to minimize cost)
  # Advanced Threat Protection - has 60-day free trial
  enableAdvancedThreatProtection:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: false
    metadata:
      description: Enable Advanced Threat Protection (~$15/server/month after 60-day trial)

variables:
  auditStorageAccountName: "[if(empty(parameters('auditStorageAccountName')), concat('sqlaudit', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id)), parameters('auditStorageAccountName'))]"

resources:
  # Azure SQL Server
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[parameters('serverName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      administratorLogin: "[parameters('administratorLogin')]"
      administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]"
      version: "12.0"
      minimalTlsVersion: "1.2"
      publicNetworkAccess: Enabled
    tags:
      environment: startup
      cost-tier: minimal

  # Azure SQL Database - Basic tier for minimal cost
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('serverName'), '/', parameters('databaseName'))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"
    sku:
      name: "[parameters('skuName')]"
      tier: "[parameters('skuTier')]"
    properties:
      collation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      maxSizeBytes: "[parameters('maxSizeBytes')]"
      zoneRedundant: false
      readScale: Disabled
      requestedBackupStorageRedundancy: Local
    tags:
      environment: startup
      cost-tier: minimal

  # Firewall rule - Allow Azure services (needed for app connectivity)
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('serverName'), '/AllowAzureServices')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: 0.0.0.0
      endIpAddress: 0.0.0.0

  # Connection policy
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/connectionPolicies
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('serverName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"
    properties:
      connectionType: Default

  # Minimal-cost storage account for audit logs
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: "2023-01-01"
    condition: "[parameters('enableAuditing')]"
    name: "[variables('auditStorageAccountName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: Standard_LRS
    kind: StorageV2
    properties:
      minimumTlsVersion: TLS1_2
      supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true
      accessTier: Cool
    tags:
      environment: startup
      purpose: sql-audit-logs

  # SQL Server Auditing - minimal cost, high value for security posture
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/auditingSettings
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    condition: "[parameters('enableAuditing')]"
    name: "[concat(parameters('serverName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('auditStorageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      state: Enabled
      storageEndpoint: "[if(parameters('enableAuditing'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('auditStorageAccountName')), '2023-01-01').primaryEndpoints.blob, '')]"
      storageAccountAccessKey: "[if(parameters('enableAuditing'), listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('auditStorageAccountName')), '2023-01-01').keys[0].value, '')]"
      retentionDays: "[parameters('auditRetentionDays')]"
      isAzureMonitorTargetEnabled: false
      auditActionsAndGroups:
        - SUCCESSFUL_DATABASE_AUTHENTICATION_GROUP
        - FAILED_DATABASE_AUTHENTICATION_GROUP
        - BATCH_COMPLETED_GROUP

  # Advanced Threat Protection - off by default to save $15/month
  # RECOMMENDATION: Enable the 60-day free trial immediately
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/advancedThreatProtectionSettings
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('serverName'), '/Default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))]"
    properties:
      state: "[if(parameters('enableAdvancedThreatProtection'), 'Enabled', 'Disabled')]"

  # Transparent Data Encryption - free, always enable
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/transparentDataEncryption
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('serverName'), '/', parameters('databaseName'), '/current')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('serverName'), parameters('databaseName'))]"
    properties:
      state: Enabled

  # Security Alert Policy at database level - free baseline alerting
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/securityAlertPolicies
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('serverName'), '/', parameters('databaseName'), '/Default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('serverName'), parameters('databaseName'))]"
    properties:
      state: Enabled

outputs:
  sqlServerFqdn:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
  databaseName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('databaseName')]"
  connectionString:
    type: string
    value: "[concat('Server=tcp:', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('serverName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName, ',1433;Database=', parameters('databaseName'), ';Encrypt=true;TrustServerCertificate=false;Connection Timeout=30;')]"
  monthlyCostEstimate:
    type: string
    value: "[if(parameters('enableAuditing'), 'Estimated ~$5-7/month (Basic DB + minimal audit storage)', 'Estimated ~$5/month (Basic DB only)')]"
  securityNotes:
    type: string
    value: "TDE and Security Alerts are enabled (free). Auditing is low-cost. Consider enabling ATP 60-day free trial via enableAdvancedThreatProtection=true."
